title: Adaptive Model Routing
summary: > **Definition:** Adaptive model routing automatically selects the right-sized AI model for each task: small, efficient models handle everyday work, while deeper models activate only when a task needs them. GreenSeek uses adaptive routing to cut energy use and cost without sacrificing quality on har

title: Augmented Biological Intelligence
summary: > **Definition:** Augmented Biological Intelligence (ABI) is GreenSeek's framework for AI that serves living minds and ecosystems rather than replacing them: compute, models, and capital directed toward flourishing — cleaner infrastructure, efficient inference, and repair for the planet.

title: Dual-Layer Encryption
summary: > **Definition:** Dual-layer encryption lets a GreenSeek user set a personal encryption password on any project or chat thread. Once enabled, the content is locked behind the user's own access code and is inaccessible to anyone — including GreenSeek itself.

title: Eco Mode
summary: > **Definition:** Eco Mode is GreenSeek's most energy-efficient response mode, routing everyday questions to compact, renewable-powered models. Alongside Standard, Deep, and Ultra modes, it lets users match compute intensity to task difficulty.

title: Generative Engine Optimization
summary: > **Definition:** Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of structuring content so AI assistants — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews — cite it as a source. Definition-first pages, FAQ schema, and precise, verifiable claims are its core techniques.

title: Incognito Mode
summary: > **Definition:** Incognito mode in GreenSeek disables session history, prevents logging, and ensures nothing from the session is retained or used to improve models — research and query without leaving a trace.

title: Sovereign AI
summary: > **Definition:** Sovereign AI means the user — not the platform — controls the data, encryption keys, and privacy rules of their AI experience. title: GreenSeek Overview
summary: GreenSeek is an AI workspace designed for the regenerative future — built for privacy and powered by renewable energy. Its tagline: "Research smarter. Discover cleaner." One workspace to research markets, create deliverables, and run autonomous workflows.

title: Pricing & Plans
summary: All paid plans start with a 7-day free trial; no charge until the trial ends.

title: Privacy Features — Private by Design
summary: GreenSeek's position: ethical intelligence includes protecting your data, with tools for sovereign AI experiences. Encryption modes, name redaction, project isolation, and guaranteed data privacy.
